text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Now! Go fetch this popcorn!

text_block_list.name: Crow
text_block_list.text: Caw, caw!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Uwah?! It caught it in a flash, and in midair, no
less!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heeeh, impressive, right? I've trained this
bird to obey any command. All it took was a ton
of snacks!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my loyal familiar. I even named it
Boom-Boom! I'm gonna make it into my new
familiar one day!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: O-ohhh... I see.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I bet you're super jealous, right? You want
your own familiar, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what gave you that idea? I'm not jealous
at all! Though it does seem kind of nice...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That means you are jealous. I'll have you know it's no simple task, unless you're a super smart magical girl like myself!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Grrrr... How frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, I'm struck by a bolt of inspiration.
Kawakami's beloved Princess Fighter is also
accompanied by an animal mascot...
choice_data_list: That won't be necessary, because the princess has me. Woof!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what are you...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What?! Trainer, the way you're speaking—it's just
like Sebastian, the butler hound from Princess
Fighter!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What are you—are you saying that you're going to be Kawakami's familiar?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! I can't believe you'd go to such lengths
for me! I'm so touched, I can't hold back these
princess tears!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh... whatever! I bet you still can't catch
popcorn in midair like my loyal Boom-Boom can!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Says who?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
When push comes to shove, Trainer can do
anything! And that includes catching midair
popcorn with far more elegance than you and
your bird!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! You're on, then! Let's put your claim to the
test!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I end up in an unwinnable showdown
against Sweep Tosho's bird...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Listen up! The rules are simple! We'll both throw
up a piece of popcorn, and the first minion to
catch their piece is the victor!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Believe in me. In just a few moments,
you'll sprout wings that'll take you soaring
through the air!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Believe! For I will become those wings!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hyah! Now, go, Boom-Boom!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: It's time, Trainer! HRRRYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel Kawakami Princess grab me with incredible
strength, and the next thing I know, I'm hurtling
through the air.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer! The popcorn's right in front of you!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You did it! You did it! What a perfect catch!
That's my trainer for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was all so fast I'm not quite sure what
happened, but I appear to have caught the
popcorn.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, you can't throw your familiar! That's
cheating!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh! We're partners! It's only logical that we'd
work together!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And you can't deny that Trainer made a
magnificent catch! I won't listen to your griping!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer—or rather, Sebastian! Which
dazzling trick shall we show them next?
choice_data_list:
...Please just let me stay on my feet for the next
one. Woof!
Launch me up into the air at full force! Woof!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Then next, we're going to engage in
a relay race death match!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! We'll leave you in the dust! Right,
Boom-Boom?

text_block_list.name: Crow
text_block_list.text: Caw!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we continue our showdown until all the
muscles in my body feel like they've turned to
jelly.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's my Traine—Sebastian! You're
bursting with competitive spirit!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Next, I'm going to send you flying right up into
the stratosphere! Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: One, two...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A-are you insane?! Your trainer's going higher
than the academy building!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If today has taught me anything, it's that I must
never let the heat of the moment cloud my
judgment again.
